---
title: "Results"
---

## Key findings
Add bullet points as you go.

## Figures

![Figure 1](figures/PCoA_Plot_BNFO.png)

![Figure 2](figures/Bar_Plot_BNFO.png)

![Figure 3](figures/Shannon Diversity Plot.png)

![Figure 4](figures/Shannon Diversity Wilcoxon Test.png)

![Figure 5](figures/tma_boxplot_log.jpeg)

![Figure 6](figures/tma_presence_bar.jpeg)
